headline: Woman's Plants Have A Fight, One Has 'Moved Out' To The Windowsill, Demands Space
summary: The fern has been 'spreading rumors' about the succulent. The succulent has been 'seeing other pots.'
fullBody: Amanda McPlant has been dealing with drama among her houseplants. 'The fern and the succulent had a disagreement,' Amanda said. 'The fern has been spreading rumors.' The succulent has 'moved out' to the windowsill and is 'seeing other pots.' Amanda is now acting as a mediator. 'They're not speaking,' Amanda said. 'It's a plant standoff.'
